botConstructor.title: Bot Constructor
botConstructor.subtitle: Gina bot ɗin ku a gani - babu lambar da ake buƙata
botConstructor.welcomeMessage: Saƙon maraba lokacin da mai amfani ya fara bot...
botConstructor.scheduledMessage: Saƙon da za a aika akan jadawalin...
botConstructor.defaultWelcome: Barka da zuwa! Ni ne bot ɗin ku. Yi amfani /taimako don ganin umarni.
botConstructor.randomPick: Bot yana zaɓar ɗaya ba da gangan ba
botConstructor.notifyOnEvent: Yana tasowa lokacin da mai amfani ya aika saƙo
botConstructor.docsCommand: Yana amsawa lokacin da mai amfani ya aika takamaiman umarni (misali /help, /fara). Kuna iya ƙara matakan tattaunawa don ƙirƙirar maganganun matakai masu yawa.
botConstructor.docsMessage: Yana amsawa lokacin da saƙon mai amfani ya dace da tsari. Yana amfani da regex - misali. "hello|hi" yayi daidai da kalmomin biyu. Harka-marasa hankali.
botConstructor.docsWelcome: Masu amfani da saƙon farko suna gani lokacin da suka fara bot da / farawa. Kowane bot ya kamata ya sami ɗaya.
botConstructor.docsScheduled: Yana aika saƙo ta atomatik akan jadawali. Mai girma don tunasarwar yau da kullun, narkar da mako-mako, ko sanarwar lokaci-lokaci.
botConstructor.docsCondition: Rassan dabaru na bot. Bincika maɓalli ko shigarwar mai amfani da amsa daban dangane da sakamakon.
botConstructor.docsRandom: Bot yana ɗaukar amsa ɗaya ba da gangan daga lissafin. Cikakke don barkwanci, nasiha, gaisuwa, ko amsa iri-iri.
botConstructor.docsApi: Yana yin buƙatar HTTP zuwa API na waje kuma yana amfani da amsa a cikin saƙon bot. Yi amfani da {data.field} don yin la'akari da filayen martani.
botConstructor.docsAdminNotify: Aika sanarwa zuwa admin na dakin lokacin da aka kunna. Mai amfani don faɗakarwa, sabon sanarwar mai amfani, ko daidaitawa.
botConstructor.docsConversationsDesc: Ƙara matakai zuwa toshe umarni don ƙirƙirar maganganun ma'amala. Kowane mataki yana yin tambaya, yana jiran amsar mai amfani, kuma ya adana shi zuwa mai canzawa. Yi amfani da masu canji a cikin amsa ta ƙarshe tare da {variableName}.
botConstructor.docsVariablesDesc: Yi amfani da takalmin gyaran kafa mai lanƙwasa {mai canzawa} a cikin rubutun amsa don saka ƙima mai ƙarfi. Canje-canje na jihohi suna ci gaba a cikin saƙonni.
botConstructor.docsBuiltinVars: Gina-hannukan masu canji suna samuwa a cikin kowane amsa:
botConstructor.docsVarUserId: ID na mai amfani na musamman
botConstructor.docsVarIsAdmin: Gaskiya idan mai amfani shine admin/mai shi
botConstructor.docsFormattingDesc: Kuna iya amfani da tsarawa kamar HTML a cikin martani:
botConstructor.docsTip1: Fara da toshe maraba - shine abu na farko da masu amfani ke gani
botConstructor.docsTip2: Ƙara umarnin taimako/taimako wanda ke jera duk umarnin da ake samu
botConstructor.docsTip3: Yi amfani da matakan tattaunawa don rajista, safiyo, ko tattara bayanai
botConstructor.docsTip4: Haɗa tubalan Yanayi tare da masu canji don reshe mai wayo
botConstructor.docsTip5: Gwada bot ɗin ku ta yin magana da shi a cikin daki bayan turawa

gravitixDocs.title: Maganar Harshen Gravitix
gravitixDocs.subtitle: Harshen rubutu mai inganci don gina bots. 96 fasali. Tsatsa baya.
gravitixDocs.introDesc: Gravitix harshe ne na musamman na yanki (DSL) wanda aka ƙera daga ƙasa har don rubuta bots na Vortex. Inda wasu harsuna ke buƙatar ɗakunan karatu, sake kiran waya, da tukunyar jirgi, Gravitix yana ba ku masu gudanar da taron aji na farko, gudanawar tattaunawa, da ginanniyar yanayi - duk a cikin tsaftataccen tsarin rubutu wanda aka yi wahayi zuwa gare ta Rust.
gravitixDocs.goalReadable: Ana iya karantawa - lambar tana karantawa kamar niyya, ba injina ba
gravitixDocs.goalSafe: Amintacciya - nau'ikan a tsaye suna kama kurakurai kafin lokacin aiki
gravitixDocs.goalExpressive: Mai bayyanawa - kwarara, masu gadi, da daidaita tsarin an gina su
gravitixDocs.goalMinimal: Kadan - babu azuzuwan, babu gado, babu tsarin koyo
gravitixDocs.whoDesc: Gravitix shine ga duk wanda ke son gina bot ɗin Vortex da sauri - ko ba ku taɓa rubuta lamba ba, ko kuma ku ƙwararren ƙwararren mai haɓaka ne wanda ya gaji da tukunyar jirgi na Python. Wannan tunani yana koyar da Gravitix daga ka'idodin farko: ba a buƙatar ƙwarewar da ta gabata.
gravitixDocs.howToReadDesc: Kowane sashe yana ginawa akan na baya. Idan kun kasance sababbi ga shirye-shirye, karanta daga sama zuwa kasa. Idan kun riga kun san wani yare, yi amfani da teburin abun ciki don tsalle kai tsaye zuwa ga abin da kuke sha'awar.
gravitixDocs.quickStartDesc: Hanya mafi sauri daga sifili zuwa bot mai gudu.
gravitixDocs.whatHappenedDesc: a/fara {... } - yana bayyana ma'aikacin da ke gudana lokacin da mai amfani ya aika / farawa. emit "..." - yana aika sako ga mai amfani. {ctx.first_name} - yana haɗa sunan farko na mai amfani a cikin kirtani.
gravitixDocs.runningDesc: A cikin Gravitix IDE, danna maɓallin Run a saman mashaya. Shigar da Bot Token na Vortex lokacin da aka sa. Bot yana farawa nan da nan - babu wani matakin ginawa da ake buƙata.
gravitixDocs.syntaxDesc: Kowane shirin Gravitix an gina shi daga tubalan gini guda uku: masu sarrafa, fitar da bayanai, da dabaru.
gravitixDocs.whatGoesAfterEmit: Abin da ke faruwa bayan fitarwa
gravitixDocs.multipleHandlers: Ma'aikata da yawa don faɗakarwa iri ɗaya
gravitixDocs.typesDesc: Kowane ƙima a cikin Gravitix yana da nau'i. Nau'in tsarin yana tsaye: ana duba nau'ikan a lokacin tattarawa, kafin bot ɗin ku ya gudana.
gravitixDocs.operatorsDesc: Masu aiki suna haɗa ƙima don samar da sababbin dabi'u.
gravitixDocs.stringsDesc: Zaɓuɓɓuka a cikin Gravitix rubutu ne na UTF-8. Suna goyan bayan haɗin kai mai arziƙi da rukunin ayyukan ginannun.
gravitixDocs.stringOperations: Ayyukan kirtani ta hanyar ginannun abubuwan ciki
gravitixDocs.matchDesc: Tsarin-daidaita ƙima da ƙima da yawa. Yi la'akari da shi azaman sanarwa mai ƙarfi mai ƙarfi.
gravitixDocs.functionsDesc: Ayyuka su ne tubalan lambar da za a sake amfani da su. Suna taimaka maka ka guje wa maimaitawa kuma suna sauƙaƙan fahimtar lamba.
gravitixDocs.eventHandlersDesc: Masu sarrafa su ne zuciyar Gravitix bot. Kowane mai gudanarwa yana sauraron takamaiman nau'in taron kuma yana gudana lokacin da abin ya faru.
gravitixDocs.guardDesc: Masu gadi suna ba ku damar ƙara yanayi ga mai kulawa. Mai sarrafa yana gudana ne kawai idan mai gadin ya auna gaskiya.
gravitixDocs.contextDesc: Abun ctx yana samuwa ta atomatik a cikin kowane mai kulawa. Ya ƙunshi bayani game da saƙon yanzu da kuma mai amfani da ya aika.
gravitixDocs.stateDesc: Jiha yana barin bot ɗin ku tuna abubuwa tsakanin saƙonni. Ba tare da jiha ba, kowane saƙo yana da zaman kansa kuma bot ba shi da ƙwaƙwalwar ajiya.
gravitixDocs.flowsDesc: Yawo yana ba ku damar rubuta taɗi mai matakai da yawa a cikin layi, salo mai karantawa. Gudun ruwa na iya tsayawa da jira saƙon mai amfani na gaba.
gravitixDocs.emitDesc: Aika saƙonni shine farkon fitowar bot.
gravitixDocs.emitTo: emit_to - aika zuwa takamaiman mai amfani
gravitixDocs.schedulingDesc: Gudun lambar ta atomatik akan jadawalin - babu ayyukan cron, babu sabis na waje da ake buƙata.
gravitixDocs.atSpecificTime: at - gudu a takamaiman lokacin rana
gravitixDocs.pipeDesc: Mai aiki da bututu |> yana ƙaddamar da ƙima azaman hujja ta farko zuwa aiki na gaba. Yana sanya ayyukan sarka su karanta, hagu zuwa dama.
gravitixDocs.errorDesc: Gravitix yana ba da ingantaccen sarrafa kurakurai tare da gwadawa / kama / ƙarshe.
gravitixDocs.structsDesc: Tsarin yana ba ku damar haɗa bayanai masu alaƙa a ƙarƙashin nau'in mai suna. Enums suna ayyana rufaffiyar saitin bambance-bambancen.
gravitixDocs.mathDesc: Gravitix yana jigilar cikakken ɗakin karatu na lissafi tare da ~ 180 ayyuka.
gravitixDocs.complexDesc: Gravitix yana da nau'in haɗe-haɗe na asali - nau'i biyu na 64-bit na iyo wanda ke wakiltar sassa na gaske da na tunani.
gravitixDocs.calculusDesc: Gravitix ya haɗa da ƙididdiga na ƙididdigewa: abubuwan da aka samo asali da abubuwan haɗin kai waɗanda aka lissafta akan ayyuka na sabani.
gravitixDocs.linearAlgebraDesc: Linear algebra shine lissafin vectors da matrices.
gravitixDocs.numberTheoryDesc: Ka'idar lamba tana nazarin kaddarorin lambobi. Tushen fasahar zamani.
gravitixDocs.statisticsDesc: Ƙididdiga na ba da kayan aiki don siffanta, nazari, da kuma zana ƙarshe daga bayanai.
gravitixDocs.specialDesc: Ayyuka na musamman sune mafita ga mahimman ma'auni daban-daban.
gravitixDocs.fftDesc: Canjin Fourier yana lalata sigina zuwa mitocin sa.
gravitixDocs.bp1: Koyaushe rike abin da ba a sani ba
gravitixDocs.bp3: Yi amfani da masu gadi maimakon sarƙoƙi don izini
gravitixDocs.bp5: Yi amfani da dawowa da wuri don rage gida
gravitixDocs.bp8: Yi amfani da jihar don hana spam
gravitixDocs.keepLearningDesc: Hanya mafi kyau don koyan Gravitix shine ginawa. Fara da sauƙi echo bot, sannan ƙara yanayi, sannan ƙara kwarara. Kowane sabon ra'ayi da kuka koya yana buɗe ƙarin dama.

complex_type.ct1: 🌀 Me yasa lambobi masu rikitarwa a cikin yaren bot?
complex_type.li5: Power: z **n yana amfani da dabarar De Moivre don lamba n
complex_type.p1: Hadadden lamba yana da form a + bi, inda a shine ainihin bangaren kuma b shine bangaren da ake hasashe. i ita ce raka'ar hasashe da i² = -1 ta siffanta. Lambobi masu rikitarwa suna ƙaddamar da ainihin layi zuwa jirgin sama, suna ba da damar mafita ga daidaito kamar x² + 1 = 0 waɗanda ba su da amsar gaske.
complex_type.p2: A cikin Gravitix kuna rubuta tatsuniyoyi na zahiri tare da i kari:
complex_type.p3: Dukkan ayyuka na asali guda huɗu suna aiki akan ƙididdiga masu rikitarwa kai tsaye. Gravitix yana bin ƙa'idodin ƙididdiga masu rikitarwa:
complex_type.p4: Sarrafa siginar (binciken audio, FFT), tsarar fractal (Mandelbrot set), simulators na kimiyyar lissafi, ƙididdige ƙarancin wutar lantarki, da ƙididdige ƙididdiga duk suna buƙatar ƙira mai rikitarwa. Gravitix yana baka damar gudanar da waɗannan lissafin daidai a cikin bot Vortex ba tare da ɗakunan karatu na waje ba.
complex_type.td12: Hujja (kwana a cikin radians): atan2 (b, a)
complex_type.td14: Daga nau'in polar: r·e^(iθ) = r·cos θ + ir·sin θ
complex_type.td24: Ayyukan tayar da hankali sun faɗaɗa zuwa hadadden jirgin sama

error.cc1: ya kasa idan mai amfani ya aika "hello"
error.p1: Kunna duk wani lambar da zai iya kasawa a cikin try toshe. Idan kuskure ya kasance thrown - ko dai ta Gravitix lokacin aiki ko kuma a sarari ta lambar ku - aiwatarwa ya tsallake zuwa shingen catch. Ƙimar da aka kama tana ɗaure da canjin da kuke suna bayan catch.
error.p2: finally yana gudana ba tare da wani sharadi ba - shin try yayi nasara ko kuma catch ya magance kuskure. Yi amfani da shi don sakin albarkatu, shiga, ko aika saƙon ƙarshe.
error.p3: Yi amfani da sarrafa kuskure don ayyukan da suka dogara da shigarwar waje: tantance rubutun mai amfani, kiran APIs, masu canjin yanayi, ko yin hadadden lissafi inda kurakuran yanki (sqrt na korau, log na sifili) zai yiwu. Don kurakuran dabaru na ciki, fi son guard jumla da farkon returns.

intro.li1: Ana iya karantawa - code yana karanta kamar niyya, ba injina ba.
intro.li2: Safe - iri-iri catch kurakurai kafin lokacin aiki
intro.li3: Expressive — flows, guards, da tsarin matching an gina su
intro.li4: Karamin - babu azuzuwan, babu gado, babu tsarin koyo
intro.p1: Gravitix harshe ne na musamman na yanki (DSL) da aka tsara tun daga tushe har zuwa rubuta Vortex bots. Inda wasu harsuna ke buƙatar ɗakunan karatu, sake kiran waya, da tukunyar jirgi, Gravitix yana ba ku masu gudanar da taron aji na farko, tattaunawa flows, da ginanniyar state - duk a cikin tsaftataccen tsarin rubutu wanda za'a iya karantawa ta hanyar Rust.
intro.p2: Gravitix shine ga duk wanda yake son gina bot Vortex da sauri - ko baka taba rubuta code ba, ko kuma kai kwararre ne wanda ya gaji da Python tukunyar jirgi. Wannan tunani yana koyar da Gravitix daga ƙa'idodin farko: ba a buƙatar ƙwarewar da ta gabata.
intro.p3: Kowane sashe yana ginawa akan na baya. Idan kun kasance sababbi ga shirye-shirye, karanta daga sama zuwa kasa. Idan kun riga kun san wani yare, yi amfani da teburin abun ciki don tsalle kai tsaye zuwa ga abin da kuke sha'awar.
intro.p4: A cikin wannan tunani, → yana nufin "ƙimantawa zuwa" ko "samarwa", kuma // ... yana nuna maganganun da mai tarawa yayi watsi da su.

math_calculus.cc10: Wurin da'irar kusa da radius 1: yakamata ya zama π/2
math_calculus.cc11: Ƙimar da ake tsammani: E[X] = ∫ x·p(x) dx akan rarraba ta al'ada
math_calculus.cc14: Jerin Taylor na e^x kusa x=0: 1 + x + x²/2! + x³/3! +...
math_calculus.cc16: Hanyar Newton mataki: x₁ = x₀ - f(x₀)/f'(x₀)
math_calculus.cc2: Haɓaka na biyu na x² shine 2 (madaidaicin curvature)
math_calculus.p1: haɓaka f'(x) yana auna yadda saurin f ke canzawa a aya x. Geometrically shi ne gangaren layin tangent. Gravitix yana amfani da tsakiyar bambanci don abubuwan farko (kuskure O(h²)) da tsari na biyu don abubuwan da suka samo asali na biyu.
math_calculus.p2: An integral ∫f(x)dx daga a zuwa b shine yankin da ke karkashin lankwasa. Gravitix yana ba da hanyoyi guda uku tare da haɓaka daidaito:
math_calculus.td17: Takaitawa Σ f(k) don k = daga..zuwa
math_calculus.td18: Samfura Π f(k) don k = daga..zuwa

math_complex.cc1: Juyawa aya ta kusurwar theta a cikin 2D
math_complex.cc10: (-1)^(1/3) yana da tushen cube uku a cikin hadadden jirgi
math_complex.cc2: yayi daidai da ninka ta e^(i·theta)
math_complex.cc4: Tushen haɗin kai: n-th Tushen 1 sune e^(2πik/n) don k=0..n-1
math_complex.cc6: Möbius yana canza taswirorin da'ira/layi zuwa da'ira/layi
math_complex.cc8: tare da a=1,b=0,c=0,d=1 wannan shine ainihi: w = z
math_complex.p1: Kowane hadadden lamba z = a + bi za a iya gani a matsayin aya (a, b) akan Argand jirgin. A kwance axis shi ne ainihin axis, a tsaye shi ne axis na hasashe.
math_complex.p2: Ɗaya daga cikin muhimman abubuwan da ke cikin lissafi: e^(ix) = cos x + i·sin x. Wannan yana nufin da'irar naúrar a cikin hadadden jirgin an daidaita shi ta kwana x.
math_complex.p3: Haɗaɗɗen ƙayyadaddun ƙayyadaddun bayanai, sine, cosine, da logarithm an ƙaddamar da su zuwa cikakken hadadden jirgin sama. Jerin su Taylor suna haɗuwa every inda (ko akan faifai don log).
math_complex.p4: Don hadaddun z da w, z^w = e^(w·ln z). Wannan yana ba da damar mara ƙima da ƙididdiga masu ƙima, yana bayyana haɗin kai masu ban mamaki:
math_complex.td4: Babban reshe; katsewa akan korau ainihin axis

math_core.p1: Duk ayyukan trig suna tsammanin kusurwa a cikin radians. Yi amfani da radians(deg) don canzawa daga digiri.
math_core.td17: Tangent = zunubi/cos. Ba a bayyana a π/2 + nπ
math_core.td21: Kusurwar vector (x,y) daga madaidaicin axis x. Rage (-π, π]. Hannun x=0.
math_core.td25: Maida digiri zuwa radians: d × π/180
math_core.td26: Login dabi'a (base e). ln (e) = 1, ln (1) = 0. Domain x & gt; 0.
math_core.td27: Binary log. log₂(1024) = 10. Yawan rago da ake bukata.
math_core.td28: log na gama gari. log₁₀(1000) = 3. Order of manitude.
math_core.td34: Zagaye zuwa lamba mafi kusa (rabi daga sifili)
math_core.td35: Truncate zuwa sifili: trunc(3.9) = 3, gangar jikin (-3.9) = -3
math_core.td39: Gaskiya idan |a−b| < eps (tsoho 1e-9). Safe float kwatanta.
math_core.td4: Lambar Euler, tushe na logarithm na halitta
math_core.td45: Matsakaicin layi: a + t·(b-a). t=0→a, t=1→b

math_linalg.p1: A vector jerin lambobi ne da aka yi oda. Yana iya wakiltar batu a sararin samaniya, alkibla, gudu, ko siffa a cikin ML.
math_linalg.p2: Matrix jerin lambobi ne na 2D. Matrix m × n yana da layuka m da ginshiƙai. Ayyukan Matrix sune tushen sauye-sauye na layi.
math_linalg.td1: Dot samfur: Σ aᵢ·bᵢ. Sakamakon shine scalar. digo(a,b) = |a||b|kos θ
math_linalg.td10: Matrix ninkawa (A shine m ×k, B shine k ×n → sakamako m × n)
math_linalg.td11: Haɓaka every kashi ta scalar s
math_linalg.td12: Musanya layuka da ginshiƙai: Aᵀ[i][j] = A[j][i]
math_linalg.td13: Ƙaddara (LU bazuwa). Mara sifili ↔ mai jujjuyawa.

math_special.cc2: P(-σ < X < σ) don rarrabawa ta al'ada
math_special.cc3: Matsakaicin Apéry: ζ(3) mara hankali ne amma ba a san sigar da aka rufe ba
math_special.cc4: J₀(x): oscillates da rube-ya bayyana raƙuman ruwa
math_special.cc5: Y₀(x): bambanta a x=0, oscillates don babba x
math_special.cc6: Ai yana rubewa ga x→+∞, oscillates don x→-∞
math_special.cc9: Lokacin pendulum tare da amplitude θ₀:
math_special.p1: Ayyukan Gamma Γ(n) shine ci gaba da haɓaka abubuwa na abubuwa: Γ(n) = (n-1)! don tabbataccen lamba. Yana faɗaɗa ƙididdiga zuwa ainihin lambobi masu rikitarwa.
math_special.p2: Aikin kuskure erf(x) = (2/√π)∫₀ˣ e^(-t²)dt shine jigon Gaussian. Yana da alaƙa kai tsaye da na al'ada CDF kuma yana bayyana a cikin ma'auni na zafi da ka'idar yiwuwar.
math_special.p3: ζ(s) = Σ 1/nˢ don n=1,2,3,… (lokacin Re(s)>1). Haɗa zuwa babban rarraba ta hanyar samfurin Euler. Hasashen Riemann (ba a warware ba!) Ya shafi sifili na ζ a cikin hadadden jirgin sama.
math_special.p4: Ayyukan Bessel Jₙ(x) da Yₙ(x) sune mafita ga ma'auni na daban na Bessel: x²y''+ xy' + (x²−n²)y = 0. Suna fitowa a cikin yaɗuwar igiyar ruwa, zafin zafi a cikin silinda, da injiniyoyi masu yawa.
math_special.p5: Ai(x) da Bi(x) sune mafita ga y''= xy. Suna bayyana a cikin tunneling quantum (WKB kimanin) da na gani (diffraction).
math_special.p6: Waɗannan iyalai masu yawan jama'a sun taso azaman ayyukan eigen na mahimman masu aiki kuma ana amfani da su a cikin hanyoyin gani, quadrature, da injiniyoyi masu yawa.
math_special.p7: K (k) da E (k) cikakkun kayan haɗin kai ne na nau'in farko da na biyu. Suna ƙididdige lokacin pendulum marar layi da kewayen ellipse.
math_special.td2: ln|Γ(x)|. Avoid ya wuceflow na babban x.
math_special.td5: Pₙ (x): orthogonal akan [-1,1]. Bangaren kusurwa na hydrogen wavefunctions.
math_special.td6: Hₙ(x): orthogonal w.r.t. e^(-x²). Quantum harmonic oscillator.
math_special.td7: Tₙ(x) = cos(n·acos(x)): madaidaicin ƙima mai yawa.
math_special.td8: Lₙ(x): orthogonal akan [0,∞) w.r.t. e^(-x). Hydrogen radial wavefunctions.

types.p1: Alamar sa hannun lamba 64-bit. Yana goyan bayan ƙima daga kusan −9.2 × 10¹⁸ zuwa +9.2 × 10¹⁸.
types.p10: Wasu dabi'u na iya zama babu. Filayen zaɓi a cikin ctx (kamar ctx.username) na iya zama null. Koyaushe bincika kafin amfani:
types.p11: Ƙara ? bayan nau'in yana nuna shi a matsayin optional - ƙimar na iya zama null. Wannan shine yadda sigogin aiki da filayen state ke bayyana "wannan na iya kasancewa ko a'a":
types.p12: Idan ƙima bazai kasance koyaushe ba, bayyana shi T? kuma koyaushe duba != null kafin amfani dashi. Samun shiga filin null baya rushe bot - yana returns null shiru.
types.p3: 10 / 3 tare da dabi'u int guda biyu yana bada 3 (yanke). Yi amfani da 10.0 / 3.0 don samun sakamako na ƙima.
types.p4: Yana da ƙima guda biyu daidai: true da false.
types.p5: Zaren rubutu na Unicode. Zaɓuɓɓuka dabi'u ne marasa canzawa.
types.p6: Jerin ƙimar da aka ba da oda, duk nau'in iri ɗaya ne T.
types.p7: Samun dama ga fihirisar da ba ta da iyaka (misali, nums[99] lokacin da lissafin yana da abubuwa 5) returns null maimakon lalata bot ɗin ku.
types.p8: Tarin maɓalli-darajar nau'i-nau'i. Dole ne dukkan maɓallai su zama nau'i ɗaya, dole ne dukkan su zama nau'i ɗaya.
types.p9: Nau'in ayyuka na return waɗanda ba su return ƙima. Ba kasafai kuke rubuta void a sarari - shine tsoho lokacin da ba a bayyana nau'in return ba.
